subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thanks for reaching out and for your interest in collaborating.

We’d be happy to set up a short introductory call next week. Could you share a few specific 30-minute windows that work well for you (including your time zone) on Tuesday through Thursday? We’ll confirm one of those slots or suggest the closest available alternative.

Regarding internal contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering: we don’t share direct phone lines or internal directories externally. Once we’ve had an initial scoping conversation and clarified fit and next steps, we’ll coordinate any senior-level involvement on our side and handle introductions as appropriate.

Looking forward to your suggested times.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
[Your Team]
